title: oxalis modestior
intro: Oxalis modestior, also known as wood sorrel, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Oxalidaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a natural diuretic and to help reduce inflammation. The leaves of the oxalis modestior plant have been used in herbal preparations to provide health benefits such as reducing urinary tract infections and alleviating symptoms of menopause. The plant's leaves can be made into a tea or tincture for medicinal use, and it is also used in some herbal remedies to support digestive health and lower blood pressure.
